Title: Six Days
Writer: Denis Brusseaux, Guillaume Mautalent, Juan Carlos Medina
Actors: Sami Bouajila, Julie Gayet, Philippe Résimont
Plot: A police officer who was unable to find the killer of a young girl 11 years earlier. When another child is kidnapped in the same way just days before the case is closed for good, he decides to reinvestigate the unresolved kidnapping.
